home.description: Dominating Free Fire with precision, strategy, and unmatched teamwork. Join the revolution.
home.established: Established as one of MENA's premier esports organizations, we represent excellence in competitive gaming.
home.meetSquadDesc: Five exceptional players united by one mission: dominance in competitive Free Fire.

squad.title: Our Elite Squad
squad.description: Five exceptional players united by one mission: dominance in competitive Free Fire. Each member brings unique skills, experience, and unwavering commitment to excellence.
squad.philosophyText: At BLACK WARRIORS, we believe success comes from three pillars: exceptional mechanical skill, deep game knowledge, and unbreakable team cohesion. Our roster represents the best of competitive gaming in the MENA region. Each player has been carefully selected and developed through rigorous training, international competition, and continuous improvement. We don't just compete to win—we compete to dominate.

history.title: Our History
history.description: From a bold vision to becoming MENA's dominant Free Fire esports organization. This is the journey of BLACK WARRIORS.
history.elitePlayersDesc: The most skilled roster in competitive Free Fire, hand-selected and trained by the best coaching staff.
history.tournamentsDesc: Championship titles spanning regional and international competitions, establishing our dominance.
history.yearsDesc: Since 2021, we've been pushing the boundaries of competitive gaming in the MENA region.
history.vision1: BLACK WARRIORS is not just a team—we're a movement toward excellence in esports. Our vision extends beyond winning tournaments; we aim to elevate the entire competitive gaming ecosystem in the MENA region.
history.vision2: We're committed to developing the next generation of esports talent, creating opportunities for emerging players, and proving that MENA teams can dominate on the world stage.
history.vision3: Through innovation in training methodologies, investment in sports science, and community engagement, BLACK WARRIORS will continue to set the standard for what it means to be a championship esports organization.
history.vision4: The future is ours. The legends are being written. Join us on this incredible journey.

timeline.title: Foundation & Vision
timeline.description: BLACK WARRIORS is founded with a mission to establish MENA's premier Free Fire esports organization. The organization begins with intensive recruitment and training protocols.

timeline.title: First Championship
timeline.description: The newly assembled roster claims their first major tournament victory, announcing BLACK WARRIORS as a force to be reckoned with in competitive Free Fire.

timeline.title: Regional Expansion
timeline.description: BLACK WARRIORS establishes training facilities across three major cities in Morocco, implementing world-class coaching and sports science programs.

timeline.title: Youth Academy Launch
timeline.description: The organization launches its academy program to identify and develop emerging talent from the broader gaming community.

timeline.title: International Recognition
timeline.description: BLACK WARRIORS begins competing in international tournaments, establishing themselves as one of MENA's best teams on the global stage.

timeline.title: Record Breaking Season
timeline.description: The organization sets multiple tournament records, including the all-time seasonal kill record of 1,247 eliminations.

timeline.title: Media & Sponsorship Growth
timeline.description: Partnership with major sponsors and extensive media coverage brings BLACK WARRIORS into mainstream recognition.

timeline.title: Squad Completion & Dominance
timeline.description: BLACK WARRIORS secures MENA Cup 2025 championship with dominant performance.

media.title: Media Gallery
media.description: Explore photos and highlights from BLACK WARRIORS tournaments, training sessions, and team moments.
media.noMedia: No media found in this category.

recruitment.title: Join The Warriors
recruitment.description: Are you ready to compete at the highest level? BLACK WARRIORS is always searching for elite talent. If you have what it takes, we want to hear from you.
recruitment.messagePlaceholder: Share your achievements, goals, and why you want to join BLACK WARRIORS...
recruitment.disclaimer: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted by BLACK WARRIORS recruitment team.
recruitment.successMessage: Thank you for your interest in BLACK WARRIORS. Our recruitment team will review your application and contact you within 7 days.
recruitment.academyDesc: Not quite ready for the main roster? Our academy program is designed to develop emerging talent through intensive training, coaching, and competitive exposure.
recruitment.academyCta: Apply for Academy → Limited spots available
recruitment.sponsorDesc: Interested in partnering with BLACK WARRIORS? We offer comprehensive sponsorship packages for brands looking to reach the competitive gaming community.

footer.tagline: MENA's premier Free Fire esports organization. Established to dominate.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.description: A legacy built on championship titles, record-breaking performances, and unwavering excellence.
